blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
